description_long: This object consists of three vertically oriented traffic signal units mounted on a single rectangular yellow-orange backboard. Each unit features three circular signal lights arranged in a vertical stack, with black visors extending outward to shield the lenses. The backboard is marked with bold black text reading 'LEFT TURN' above and below each signal, indicating its purpose for left-turning traffic. The rear of the object shows the housing and mounting hardware, with the signal modules protruding from the front. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with glass or polycarbonate lenses for the lights. The overall construction is robust, designed for outdoor urban environments and high visibility.
description: A set of three vertical left-turn traffic lights mounted on a yellow-orange backboard, each with three circular signal lights and bold 'LEFT TURN' text.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical traffic lights with black visors and 'LEFT TURN' text clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the signal housings and the protrusion of the visors from the backboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid yellow-orange backboard and the backs of the three signal housings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and alignment of the signal modules.
